tagline: The Home of Authentic Luwombo in Kampala
about: We have been serving the best traditional Ugandan dishes since 1995. Our Luwombo is famous across Kampala for its rich flavor and authentic preparation.

services.name: Chicken Luwombo
services.description: Slow-cooked chicken in peanut sauce, served with matooke.

services.name: Beef Luwombo
services.description: Tender beef steamed in banana leaves with traditional spices.

services.name: Fresh Tilapia
services.description: Deep fried or stewed tilapia from Lake Victoria.

reviews.author: Sarah Namubiru
reviews.text: The best Luwombo I've ever had! The service is also very fast.

reviews.author: John Okello
reviews.text: Authentic taste and great atmosphere. Highly recommended for tourists.
